title: goodenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla
intro: Goodenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla, also known as the variable goodenia, is a plant species native to the eastern and northern regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Goodenia heterophylla subsp. heterophylla can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible in various herbal preparations.
